comments.replyBody: Added review.md existence guard before the review-triage phase. The guard checks if review.md exists after ensure_worktree and before running the triage agent. If review.md is missing (e.g., whole-pr-review agent exited 0 without producing the file), the phase is skipped with an info log and control passes to fix-review. This matches the existing guard pattern in the fix-review phase (line 3365).
